text: 🇺🇸 Trump lashes out at The New York Times over its reporting on the war with Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普抨击《纽约时报》关于伊朗战争的报道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 — Trump attacks the media for saying he’s losing in Iran, calling it “fake news” and asking, “have they no shame? have they no sense of decency?”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 — 特朗普抨击媒体称他在伊朗问题上处于劣势，称其为“假新闻”，并质问：“他们难道没有羞耻心吗？他们难道没有廉耻感吗？”

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 The USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar. It is now the third U.S. aircraft carrier entering the Iran theater. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 According to USNI News—the media arm of the U.S. Naval Institute—the USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) is operating off Namibia, taking an unusual route around Africa to join a growing U.S. naval buildup in the Arabian Sea amid a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Instead of transiting the Strait of Gibraltar and Mediterranean, the strike group—escorted by USS Donald Cook (DDG-75), USS Mason (DDG-87), USS Ross (DDG-71), and supported by USNS Arctic (TAOE-8)—is bypassing the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. ℹ️ Earlier today, some reports said it had crossed Gibraltar; however, this now appears not to be the case. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 美国海军乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）已穿过直布罗陀海峡。这是第三艘进入伊朗战区的美国航空母舰。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 据美国海军学会媒体机构 USNI News 报道，乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）目前正在纳米比亚附近海域行动，采取了绕行非洲的非常规路线，以加入美国在阿拉伯海日益增长的海军集结，背景是美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。该打击群由唐纳德·库克号驱逐舰（DDG-75）、梅森号驱逐舰（DDG-87）、罗斯号驱逐舰（DDG-71）护航，并由北极号补给舰（TAOE-8）支援，并未通过直布罗陀海峡和地中海，而是绕过了红海和曼德海峡。ℹ️ 今天早些时候，一些报道称它已穿过直布罗陀；然而，目前看来并非如此。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 German Chancellor Merz expressed concern to Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu about recent events in the West Bank, urging that there must be no annexation of the West Bank. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 德国总理默茨向以色列总理内塔尼亚胡表达了对西岸近期事件的担忧，敦促不得吞并西岸。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A meeting is scheduled to be held tomorrow in Washington between the Lebanese and Israeli ambassadors to the United States at 6:00 PM Beirut time, with the United States Secretary of State expected to join for a few minutes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩和以色列驻美大使定于明天下午6点（贝鲁特时间）在华盛顿举行会晤，预计美国国务卿将加入几分钟。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇮🇷 The number of ships transits between Kharg island and mainland Iran has remained high despite the ongoing ceasefire. Satellite imagery from April 6th and 11th showed 7 and 28 ships respectively. This is down from the peak of the war (33) but still significantly above usual numbers. The IRGC is expected to continue the renforcement of the island as the threat of the return of the war looms over the region. This is not the daily number of transits but the number of ships seen at once on the satellite imagery . @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇮🇷 尽管停火仍在持续，哈尔克岛与伊朗大陆之间的船只往来数量依然保持高位。4月6日和11日的卫星图像分别显示有7艘和28艘船只。这虽低于战争高峰期（33艘），但仍远高于正常水平。随着战争重燃的威胁笼罩该地区，预计伊斯兰革命卫队将继续加强对该岛的防御。这不是每日的过境数量，而是卫星图像上同时看到的船只数量。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Heavy Israeli airstrikes have targeted the city of Tyre a few moments ago. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli Flare bombs in the sky of Tyre, Southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列刚才对提尔市进行了猛烈的空袭。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列照明弹在黎巴嫩南部提尔市上空。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷The USS George H.W. Bush has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar enroute to the Middle East. This picture is old. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 USNI News: The USS George H.W. Bush didn’t sail through the Strait of Gibraltar to the Mediterranean, but rather the aircraft carrier will sail around Africa to avoid sailing through the Red Sea and the Bab el-Mandeb. Both of these areas would put aircraft carrier at risk of attack from Houthi drones or missiles. A notice to mariners states that a “grace period” allowing neutral vessels to leave Iranian ports has ended, warning that any ship entering or departing the blockaded area without authorisation may face interception, diversion, or capture. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰已穿过直布罗陀海峡，前往中东。这张照片是旧的。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 USNI News：乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰并未穿过直布罗陀海峡进入地中海，而是将绕行非洲，以避免通过红海和曼德海峡。这两个区域都会使航空母舰面临胡塞武装无人机或导弹袭击的风险。一份海员通知称，允许中立船只离开伊朗港口的“宽限期”已经结束，并警告称，任何未经授权进入或离开封锁区域的船只都可能面临拦截、改道或扣押。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Heavy Israeli airstrikes have targeted the city of Tyre a few moments ago. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列刚才对提尔市进行了猛烈的空袭。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Illinois has repealed its HIV-specific criminal statute after Governor JB Pritzker signed new legislation, ending felony penalties tied to non-disclosure under a law dating back to 1986. The move removes provisions that criminalized activities such as sex, needle sharing, or blood donation without disclosure. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊利诺伊州在州长 JB·普利兹克签署新法案后，废除了针对艾滋病毒的特定刑事法规，结束了自1986年以来因未披露病情而导致的重罪处罚。此举取消了将性行为、共用针头或献血等未披露行为定为犯罪的条款。推文

text: 🇮🇷 Dr. Mohammad Javad Larijani: "The Islamic Republic of Iran today is the world's greatest missile power. Our air force power is not that great. We're not pursuing atomic power either. But we are the world's greatest missile power, and we know how to use it." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 穆罕默德·贾瓦德·拉里贾尼博士：“今天的伊朗伊斯兰共和国是世界上最强大的导弹大国。我们的空军力量并不那么强大。我们也没有追求原子能。但我们是世界上最强大的导弹大国，而且我们知道如何使用它。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 🇪🇬 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi held a phone call with Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov to discuss the latest regional developments and the Iran–US negotiations in Islamabad, Pakistan. He also held separate calls with Saudi Foreign Minister Faisal bin Farhan, Qatari Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Al Thani, Omani Foreign Minister Badr Al-Busaidi, and Egyptian Foreign Minister Badr Abdel Aati. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 🇪🇬 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐与俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫通电话，讨论了最新的地区局势以及在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行的伊美谈判。他还分别与沙特外交大臣费萨尔·本·法尔汉、卡塔尔首相兼外交大臣穆罕默德·本·阿卜杜勒拉赫曼·阿勒萨尼、阿曼外交大臣巴德尔·布赛义迪以及埃及外交部长巴德尔·阿卜杜勒阿提进行了通话。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 The American carrier strike group centered around USS Gerald R. Ford was operating today east of Cyprus. She was already in the same area two days ago, she is not in transit and is expected to remain in the area until new orders are given. The carrier can be seen being refuelled by a supply ship. They are flanked by a pair of Arleigh Burke class destroyers. The European Space Agency providing the satellite imagery is delaying by a day the release of satellite imagery of the eastern Mediterranean sea where the European carrier group is operating. The American carrier strike group was caught here right on the edge. This is why the right part of the satellite view isn't loaded. CVN-78 33.75N 29.18E @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 以杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰为核心的美国航母打击群今天在地中海东部塞浦路斯以东海域行动。两天前它就已经在该区域，目前并未处于航行状态，预计在接到新命令前将留在该区域。可以看到航母正在接受补给舰的加油。它们由两艘阿利·伯克级驱逐舰护航。提供卫星图像的欧洲航天局将欧洲航母群所在的地中海东部卫星图像发布推迟了一天。美国航母打击群在这里被捕捉到，正好处于边缘位置。这就是为什么卫星视图的右侧没有加载出来。CVN-78 33.75N 29.18E @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Shipbrokers and analysts say it's unclear how ships can satisfy both U.S. and Iranian conditions on leaving the Persian Gulf. Tanker owners say they will hesitate before sending new vessels through the Strait. - WSJ tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：船舶经纪人和分析师表示，目前尚不清楚船只如何能同时满足美国和伊朗关于离开波斯湾的条件。油轮船主表示，在派遣新船只通过海峡前会犹豫不决。- WSJ 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @clashreport : Instead of taking the usual route through the Mediterranean and Red Sea, the USS George H.W. Bush is sailing the much longer route around Africa to reach the Persian Gulf. The detour avoids Houthi-controlled waters like the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. Source: USNI https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2043777698653217160/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @clashreport : 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰没有采取通常的地中海和红海路线，而是绕行非洲，走更长的路线到达波斯湾。此举避开了红海和曼德海峡等胡塞武装控制的水域。来源：USNI https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2043777698653217160/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index President Trump's naval blockade of Iran 'risks further upending a global economy already battered by weeks of war' and 'escalating a regional clash into a worldwide financial shock that could prove more devastating than the fighting itself', according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：据《华尔街日报》报道，特朗普总统对伊朗的海上封锁“有可能进一步颠覆本已因数周战争而受损的全球经济”，并将“一场地区冲突升级为一场可能比战斗本身更具破坏性的全球金融冲击”。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Foreign Ministry condemned what it called the "desecration of Al-Aqsa Mosque" by Israeli officials, calling on Islamic countries to take action against Israel's "policy to change the Islamic and historical identity of Jerusalem." tweet

text: WarMonitor Trump says it “won’t be pleasant” if Iran doesn’t reach a deal within two weeks. It's like a merry-go-round. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：特朗普表示，如果伊朗在两周内达不成协议，那将“不会令人愉快”。这就像一场旋转木马。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The US blockade of Iranian trade through the Strait of Hormuz is pushing global oil markets into renewed turmoil, with supply already under severe strain. Around “2 million barrels per day” of Iranian oil exports could be removed from the market, intensifying a global scramble for crude. Oil prices have surged, with Brent crude rising to about $101 a barrel. Shipbrokers say that it isn't clear how ships can satisfy both US and Iranian conditions on leaving the Persian Gulf, and tanker owners say they will hesitate before sending new vessels through the Strait @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ：美国对伊朗通过霍尔木兹海峡贸易的封锁正将全球石油市场推向新的动荡，供应本已处于严重紧张状态。每天约“200万桶”的伊朗石油出口可能从市场上消失，加剧了全球对原油的争夺。油价飙升，布伦特原油价格涨至每桶约101美元。船舶经纪人表示，目前尚不清楚船只如何能同时满足美国和伊朗关于离开波斯湾的条件，油轮船主表示，在派遣新船只通过海峡前会犹豫不决。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 CNN: Trump officials are internally discussing details for a potential second, in-person meeting with Iranian officials before the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran expires next week, should the opportunity present itself, a source familiar with the talks told CNN, though it’s unclear whether such a meeting could materialize. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 CNN：一位熟悉谈判的消息人士告诉 CNN，特朗普政府官员正在内部讨论在华盛顿与德黑兰之间的停火协议下周到期前，与伊朗官员进行第二次面对面会晤的细节（如果机会出现的话），尽管目前尚不清楚这种会晤能否实现。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: 🇰🇲 Elpis, a Comoros-flagged oil and chemical "shadow fleet" tanker sanctioned by the U.S. in 2025 for handling Iranian petroleum, appears to be challenging Trump’s blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇰🇲 Elpis 是一艘悬挂科摩罗旗帜的石油和化学品“影子船队”油轮，因处理伊朗石油而在2025年受到美国制裁，目前似乎正在挑战特朗普的封锁。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: Instead of taking the usual route through the Mediterranean and Red Sea, the USS George H.W. Bush is sailing the much longer route around Africa to reach the Persian Gulf. The detour avoids Houthi-controlled waters like the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. Source: USNI
text_zh: 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰没有采取通常的地中海和红海路线，而是绕行非洲，走更长的路线到达波斯湾。此举避开了红海和曼德海峡等胡塞武装控制的水域。来源：USNI

text: Instead of taking the usual route through the Mediterranean and Red Sea, the USS George H.W. Bush is sailing the much longer route around Africa to reach the Persian Gulf. The detour avoids Houthi-controlled waters like the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. Source: USNI
text_zh: 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰没有采取通常的地中海和红海路线，而是绕行非洲，走更长的路线到达波斯湾。此举避开了红海和曼德海峡等胡塞武装控制的水域。来源：USNI

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary-General Sheikh Naim Qassem on attempts to create sectarian strife: "They are starting to promote that Turkey is creating a problem between Sunnis and Shia. Who is working on this? The Americans and the Israelis and Israel's servants internally. They want the strife to be between others, so they can get rid of both. We with our brothers the Sunnis are one heart. This strife, they will not succeed in it. Israel's servants will fail. We will not allow strife to raise its head. The Christians of all their sects and the Muslims of all their denominations — Sunnis and Druze and Alawites and all — are our brothers in the nation, in religion, and in the heavenly messages. What unites us is much stronger than the devils of the interior and exterior and the trumpets of strife." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆谈及制造宗派冲突的企图：“他们开始宣传土耳其正在制造逊尼派和什叶派之间的问题。谁在做这件事？美国人、以色列人以及以色列在内部的走狗。他们希望冲突发生在别人之间，这样他们就可以除掉双方。我们与我们的逊尼派兄弟是一条心。这种冲突，他们不会得逞。以色列的走狗将会失败。我们不会允许冲突抬头。所有教派的基督徒和所有教派的穆斯林——逊尼派、德鲁兹派、阿拉维派等等——都是我们在国家、宗教和天启信息中的兄弟。团结我们的力量远比内部和外部的魔鬼以及冲突的号角强大得多。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 ⚡️ Trump deleted his AI-generated image on TRUTH Social, depicting himself as Jesus Christ.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 ⚡️ 特朗普删除了他在 TRUTH Social 上发布的 AI 生成的将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片。

text: BIG: A U.S. Army unit ran out of its ENTIRE stock of Precision Strike Missiles (PRSM) early in last month’s war with Iran. The missile — still in testing at the time — was used in combat for the first time and expended quickly. SOURCE
text_zh: 重大消息：美国陆军一支部队在上个月与伊朗的战争中，耗尽了其“全部”精确打击导弹（PRSM）库存。该导弹当时仍处于测试阶段，首次投入实战并迅速耗尽。来源

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇻🇦🇺🇸 "I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do." - Pope Leo XIV 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf publicly honors Pope Leo XIV for condemning US and Israeli war crimes, calling his stance "fearless." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇻🇦🇺🇸 ‘我不惧怕特朗普政府，也不惧怕大声说出福音的信息，我相信我来到这里就是为了做这件事，教会来到这里也是为了做这件事。’ - 教皇利奥十四世 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫公开向谴责美国和以色列战争罪行的教皇利奥十四世致敬，称其立场“无畏”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: I think you voted for me. DoorDash worker: Uhh, maybe.
text_zh: 特朗普：我想你投了我的票。DoorDash 员工：呃，也许吧。

text: Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem urged Lebanon to cancel planned talks with Israel in Washington, calling them pointless, while vowing to continue confronting Israeli attacks.
text_zh: 真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆敦促黎巴嫩取消计划中在华盛顿与以色列的会谈，称其毫无意义，并誓言继续对抗以色列的袭击。

text: The U.S. and Iran are still in contact after failed weekend talks, with officials saying there is “forward motion” toward a possible agreement. Source: CBS News
text_zh: 美国和伊朗在周末谈判失败后仍保持联系，官员称在达成可能协议方面有“进展”。来源：CBS News

text: Venezuela is set to grant new oil fields to Chevron to boost production, as part of efforts to attract foreign investment and revive its energy sector. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 委内瑞拉准备向雪佛龙授予新的油田以提高产量，作为吸引外国投资和振兴能源部门努力的一部分。来源：彭博社

text: Netanyahu attacks Europe: Europe is losing control of its identity, infected with deep moral weakness.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡抨击欧洲：欧洲正在失去对其身份的控制，被深层的道德软弱所感染。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Security inspectors at the Shavei Shomron crossing stopped a garbage truck arriving from the east, where approximately 40 Palestinian illegal border crossers were found hiding in the waste compartment. Several were unconscious and are being treated by Magen David Adom. All suspects have been transferred to security forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 沙维·肖姆隆（Shavei Shomron）过境点的安全检查员拦下了一辆从东部驶来的垃圾车，在垃圾箱中发现了约40名非法越境的巴勒斯坦人。其中几人昏迷，正在接受大卫红星会的治疗。所有嫌疑人已被移交给安全部队。@wfwitness
